basic_details.job_title: ESIS Mulund Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Senior Resident, Medical Officer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Employees State Insurance Society Hospital Mulund
basic_details.post_name: Senior Resident / Speciality Medical Officer / Medical Officer
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Society Hospital Mulund (ESIS Mulund) Recruitment 2026: Employees State Insurance Society Hospital Mulund is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 7 Senior Resident / Speciality Medical Officer / Medical Officer posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS and MD Anaesthesia. Registered with MMC with renewal, MBBS and MD Pathology. Registered with MMC with renewal, MBBS with P.G./DNB Degree from recognized university. OR PG Diploma from recognized university, MBBS Degree from recognized university.
qualification.details: Senior Resident - Anaesthesia: MBBS and MD Anaesthesia. Registered with MMC with renewal. Senior Resident - Pathology: MBBS and MD Pathology. Registered with MMC with renewal. Speciality Medical Officer - Surgery: MBBS with P.G./DNB Degree from a recognized university. OR PG Diploma from a recognized university. Speciality Medical Officer - Gynecology: MBBS with P.G./DNB Degree from a recognized university. OR PG Diploma from a recognized university. Medical Officer: MBBS Degree from a recognized university.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.1,27,141/- Per Month, Rs. 85,000/- per month, Rs. 75,000/- per month
salary_details.details: Senior Resident (Anaesthesia/Pathology): Rs.1,27,141/- Per Month, Rs. 85,000/- per month, Rs. 75,000/- per month Speciality Medical Officer: Rs.1,27,141/- Per Month, Rs. 85,000/- per month, Rs. 75,000/- per month Medical Officer: Rs.1,27,141/- Per Month, Rs. 85,000/- per month, Rs. 75,000/- per month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIS Mulund Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIS Mulund Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 01 July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the ESIS Mulund Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies available for the posts of Senior Resident, Speciality Medical Officer, and Medical Officer in ESIS Mulund Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for ESIS Mulund Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ESIS Mulund Recruitment 2026. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the posts in ESIS Mulund Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts in the ESIS Mulund Recruitment 2026 is 69 years. No specific age relaxation details are provided.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer post, candidates must possess an MBBS Degree from a recognized university. This is the minimum educational qualification required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Senior Resident posts in ESIS Mulund Recruitment 2026 is Rs.1,27,141/- Per Month, Rs. 85,000/- per month, and Rs. 75,000/- per month, depending on the specific role and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ESIS Mulund Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ESIS Mulund Recruitment 2026 will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any online application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. There is no online application process. Candidates must report directly to the venue on the specified date.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ESIS Mulund Hospital located?
faq.answer: The ESIS Mulund Hospital is located in Mulund, Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400080. Candidates should check the official notification for the exact interview venue address.
